basic_details.job_title: ICAR-CRRI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for SRF and Community Mobilizer Posts
basic_details.short_information: ICAR Central Rice Research Institute (ICAR-CRRI) Senior Research Fellow / Community Mobilizer (AFO) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the ICAR-CRRI Senior Research Fellow / Community Mobilizer (AFO) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Relaxable for SC, ST and OBC candidates as per Govt. of India norms.
age_limit.details: All Posts: Age relaxable for SC, ST and OBC candidates as per Govt. of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (Ag.), Post Graduate degree with NET, +2 vocational in agriculture, Matriculation with experience
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow: M.Sc. (Ag.) with specialization in Agronomy/ Soil Science / Agricultural Extension / Agricultural Economics / Entomology / Plant pathology / Breeding and Genetics / Seed Technology with 4-5 years Bachelor's degree. OR Candidate having Post Graduate degree in Botany / Life Science / Microbiology / Biotechnology / Bioinformatics / Environmental Sciences with 03 years of Bachelor's Degree and 02 years Master's Degree should have NET qualifications with 2 years of research experience. Community Mobilizer (AFO): Matric with +2 vocational in agriculture related subject/ allied agriculture. OR Matriculation with two (02) years of working experience in agricultural field work from reputed organization.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR-CRRI Recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for both Senior Research Fellow and Community Mobilizer (AFO) posts is scheduled for 17 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the total number of vacancies released by ICAR-CRRI?
faq.answer: ICAR-CRRI has released a total of 4 vacancies for the posts of Senior Research Fellow and Community Mobilizer (AFO).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: For the Senior Research Fellow post, candidates need an M.Sc. (Ag.) degree in specified specializations or a Post Graduate degree with NET qualification and relevant Bachelor's degree.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Community Mobilizer (AFO) position?
faq.answer: The Community Mobilizer (AFO) position offers a fixed salary of ₹ 15,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for ICAR-CRRI recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written-cum-Personal Interview followed by Certificate Verification.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the ICAR-CRRI office in Cuttack, Odisha.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age is relaxable for SC, ST, and OBC candidates as per the norms of the Government of India.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of the job at ICAR-CRRI?
faq.answer: The posts of Senior Research Fellow and Community Mobilizer (AFO) are contractual in nature.
